title: Procedures; interpretation of analytical results
doc_html:
§853.  Procedures; interpretation of analytical results

The commissioner shall establish and promulgate procedures for taking, identifying, handling and transporting samples.  He is further empowered to establish policies for interpretation of analytical results.

Acts 1956, No. 316, §3.
doc_text:
§853.  Procedures; interpretation of analytical results
The commissioner shall establish and promulgate procedures for taking, identifying, handling and transporting samples.  He is further empowered to establish policies for interpretation of analytical results.
Acts 1956, No. 316, §3.
